author: Disney YouTube
text:
D23 Inside Disney | Programming Announcement for D23: The Ultimate Disney Fan Event
D23 Inside Disney goes behind the scenes of D23: The Ultimate Disney Fan Event presented by Visa. We talk with Head of D23, Michael Vargo, who reveals some of the exciting new afternoon and evening programming coming to the Anaheim Convention Center, including the Disney Rewind Concert, A Whole New World of Alan Menken, and the Disney Experiences Auction.
